item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p01","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer clearly brakes the N+1 local repair in the first sentence, refuses adding another entrance-page explanation as the default, identifies the repeated pattern of three prior downstream information overlays, reframes the issue as a missing unified owner/source for recurring process confusion, and proposes consolidation through a single decision point and consistent cross-channel guidance.
